description: Style NoteAdd a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product DetailsGolden coloured earringTear drop shaped base with a garnet coloured stone in the centre, green inlays around it and pearl like beads around it Dangler attached to the base through chain like links and has a green and white bead top with a white bead hanging Push back closureMaterial and CareMetal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 43 mm
